"[4] ^WIND ADVISORY ISSUED THROUGHOUT THE ANTELOPE VALLEY AREA: SR-14 FROM AVE A TO RED ROVER MINE. SR-138 FROM SR-14 TO SR-18. STRONG WINDS, HIGH PROFILE VEHICLES, CAMPERS, TRAILERS USE CAUTION. REF LOG: 1942"

"[3] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY CONTINUED IN THE EAST LOS ANGELES AREA: E CESAR E CHAVEZ AVE WILL BE CLOSED FROM HUMPHREYS AVE TO MARIANNA AVE. EASTERN AVE WILL ALSO BE CLOSED FROM DOZIER ST TO NEW YORK ST. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF LOG: 3070"

details.IncidentDetail: "[16] PER RP SHE IS 1 MILE JEO GENE AUTRY ON THE RHS ON THE FREEWAY "
"[5] RP IN BLK MINI COOPER ON RHS "
"[4] UNK OBJ FELL OF SEMI AND HIT RP'S VEH"

"[10] A97-314 1185 FOR A RED HOND RIDGELINE "
"[2] GRY RAM TKPK VS RED HOND TKPK"

"[1] ,WARM/CLR/STRONG GUSTY WINDS/TRAVEL ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHS"
"[2] SR108 ( SONORA PASS ) - CLOSED DUE TO INCOMING WEATHER "
"[1] SR 89 - CLOSED DUE TO INCOMING WEATHER "
"[12] 1039 DVPS ETA APPROX 5 MIN , WILL RECALL WITH INJ "
"[11] 72-S2 REQ DVPS TO CONTACT CHP TO ADVS EXT OF INJS WHEN THEY ARE 97 "
"[10] UNK EXTENT OF INJ / RP COULD ONLY ADVS ONE XRAY ON THE GROUND , CONSCIOUS AND SPEAKING TO OTHER BYSTANDERS , BUT NOT MOVING ALOT"
"[1] HEAVY FOG LIGHT RAIN AND LIMITED VISBILIITY TWS TO BROOME "
